message:
fix(scheduler): simplify pinned-task routing, formatting, clippy annotations

- Collapse nested if-let into combined condition for pinned local task
  scheduling in both schedule() and wake() paths — the separate if blocks were
  semantically equivalent but added an unnecessary nesting level

- Add #[allow(clippy::significant_drop_tightening)] on TaskExecutionGuard::drop
  and test_local_task_cross_thread_wake_routes_correctly where clippy incorrectly
  suggests tightening drop scope for guards/locks that are still borrowed by
  subsequent method calls (wake_dependents_locked, record access)

- Normalize whitespace: remove trailing spaces in closure bodies and align
  formatting in the panic-unwind handler and task completion path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
